description:
## Parent

Parent epic: Markdown typography settings.

## Background

Beadsmith needs an app-wide Markdown font-size preference that survives restarts without becoming Workspace or Beadwork data. The app already uses the supported Tauri store plugin for durable local state and ADR-0004 requires new frontend/native functionality to use the typed TauRPC boundary.

## What to Build

Add a versioned settings document in a dedicated app-data store. The initial document contains a schema version and `markdownFontSize`, with 14px as the default and valid whole-number values from 8 through 32 inclusive.

Add a pure settings service around an injectable store seam. Missing state loads as the default. Malformed or unsupported state produces a typed read error while allowing callers to fall back to the default. Save validates before writing and returns typed failures. Do not place display preferences inside the Workspace Catalog document.

Expose typed TauRPC operations to load the current settings and persist a complete valid settings value. Regenerate and verify the TypeScript contract. Do not expose direct frontend store access or introduce raw Tauri invocation.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] A versioned app settings shape contains the Markdown base font size.
- [ ] Missing persisted state loads as 14px without an error.
- [ ] Only whole-number values from 8 through 32 inclusive can be persisted.
- [ ] Malformed/unsupported persisted state is distinguishable from a missing/default state.
- [ ] Read and save failures are typed and safe for frontend display.
- [ ] Settings use a dedicated app-data store and do not modify Workspace Catalog state.
- [ ] Pure service tests use a fake store for default, valid, invalid, read-failure, and save-failure paths.
- [ ] Typed TauRPC load/update operations and generated TypeScript bindings are covered.
- [ ] Relevant Rust formatting, checks, and tests pass.

## Out of Scope

- React Settings UI.
- Markdown rendering changes.
- Font-family settings.
- Per-Workspace settings.

## Triage

ready-for-agent
title: Persist versioned app settings through TauRPC
